title: Gambling bowl, dice, and bag
desc: Wooden gambling tray and set of three bird claw dice, set of four dice made from heads of metal tacks, set of three cherry stone dice, set of two cherry stone dice, set of two dice made from china, and a bone die carved to represent bird's claw; Materials: Wood, Cotton canvas, Twine / String, Hide Thong / Babich, Bird Claw(s), Fruit Pit, Seed(s), Metal Tacks / bosses, Porcelain; Techniques: Carved; Acquisition Source: Donald A. Cadzow; Collection Site: File Hills; Courtesy of the Smithsonian: National Museum of the American Indian

title: Dice / Die
